# Civilization and Its Discontents

*[Freud](../philosophers/freud.md) · 1930 · *Das Unbehagen in der Kultur**

Freud argues that civilization comes at the price of a lasting discontent: to live together, humans must repress powerful drives, among them a native aggressiveness that culture does not erase but turns back against the self, as guilt. 'Man is a wolf to man': common life is a dam raised against this drive-laden depth.
